attack_chain.description: Before being fired, the insider (Mr. Orange) downloaded configuration information and network diagrams from internal repositories.

attack_chain.description: Attacker successfully logged into the public-facing CI/CD server using still-valid credentials that had not been revoked after termination.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: successful login to uh ci server so basically uh mr orange is is trying to log back into the environment

attack_chain.description: Created a new user account on the CI server to establish persistence.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: he did create a user on a ci server

initial_access_vector: Fired employee re-used still-valid credentials to log back into a public-facing CI/CD server (access was not terminated immediately after termination).
persistence_mechanism: Created a new user account on the CI/CD server.
privilege_escalation: Discovered additional credentials stored in files on a critical server and used them to access production systems.
